about.name: about-me
about.dec1: I’m a self-taught full-stack developer who builds modern, fast, and user-friendly web applications from scratch and turns them into fully functional digital products.
about.dec2: By combining both frontend and backend technologies, I transform ideas into real-world solutions. I’ve helped various clients establish and grow their online presence.
about.dec3: I’m always learning new technologies and constantly improving my skills to deliver high-quality, scalable, and efficient solutions.
